jobs.purpose: Weekly per-provider. Pulls the latest rate updates from the provider's rate catalog + upserts into tax_rates. Handles fiscal-year rate changes (e.g. UK VAT 20% → 22% at the next fiscal year boundary).
steps: Load the tenant + provider_config
Call the provider's syncRates() driver method (TaxJar's /v2/rates endpoint, Avalara's /tax/authorities, Stripe Tax's built-in registry)
For each returned rate: upsert into tax_rates via (tenant_id, tax_jurisdiction_id, rate_type, effective_from) unique

When an existing rate has changed percentage: create a new tax_rates row with new effective_from + set effective_to on the old row (never MUTATE historical rates — the calculation-freeze pattern requires immutable snapshots)
Emit TaxRateCreated + TaxRateUpdated + TaxRateExpired events

jobs.purpose: The workhorse. Fired by the invoice module on invoice_line create. Resolves jurisdiction + rate + exemptions + persists a tax_calculations snapshot.
steps: Load the invoice_line + customer + source_amount + source_currency
Resolve TaxJurisdiction via TaxAddressResolver::resolveForCustomer($customer) — refuse when unresolvable (TAX_CALCULATION_JURISDICTION_UNRESOLVABLE, blocks the invoice line)
Select provider — tenant's active TaxProviderConfig for the jurisdiction OR the config's default (config.default_provider_by_jurisdiction). Refuse when circuit-breaker OPEN.
Fire TaxCalculationRequested (correlation_id, ...)
PRE-DISPATCH GATE — CircuitBreakerGate check; failure = TAX_CALCULATION_PROVIDER_FAILED (blocks the line)
Load active TaxExemptions via TaxExemptionRepository::activeFor(tenant, customer, jurisdiction, today)
Call the provider driver's calculate(sourceAmountCents, sourceCurrency, jurisdiction, exemptions, appliesTo) with 10s timeout
On 2xx + valid response: freeze the result into a tax_calculations row (tax_rate_snapshot + exemption_applied + provider + provider_transaction_id + provider_metadata)
Fire TaxCalculationCompleted
On transient failure: retry with exponential backoff [1s, 5s, 15s] max 3 attempts
On terminal failure: fire TaxCalculationFailed (P1 — pages finance ops) + NEVER silently fall back to another provider
Update circuit-breaker consecutive_failure_count on failure; reset to 0 on success
jobs.note: tries=1 because the retry semantics are OWNED by this job body (via the exponential backoff loop). Do NOT enable Laravel-level retry — it would bypass the circuit-breaker + calculation-freeze semantics.

jobs.purpose: Async cross-check against the issuing jurisdiction's public registry (when one exists). Dispatched from TaxExemptionObserver.creating.
steps: Load the exemption + issuing_jurisdiction
Resolve verifier via #[AsExemptionVerifier] discovery — matches on (jurisdiction.country_code, exemption_type)
When no verifier registered: skip auto-verification, leave in pending status (manual review required)
When registered: call verifier->verify($exemption). Success = transition to verified. Failure = transition to rejected with reason from verifier.
Fire TaxExemptionVerified or TaxExemptionRejected
Store verifier response in exemption.metadata for audit trail

jobs.purpose: Nightly sweep. Finds exemptions with verification_status='verified' AND valid_until <= today. Transitions to verification_status='expired'.
steps: SELECT id FROM tax_exemptions WHERE verification_status = 'verified' AND valid_until IS NOT NULL AND valid_until <= CURRENT_DATE LIMIT 1000
For each: transition verification_status to 'expired' + fire TaxExemptionExpired
Emit metric academorix.tax.exemptions.expired_total per exemption_type

jobs.purpose: Daily. Finds exemptions expiring in 60/30/7 days that have not been warned. Fires TaxExemptionExpiringNotification per exemption.
steps: For each threshold IN [60, 30, 7] days:
SELECT id FROM tax_exemptions WHERE verification_status='verified' AND valid_until = CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL threshold DAYS AND (metadata->>'warnings_sent'->>$threshold) IS NULL
For each: dispatch TaxExemptionExpiringNotification + set metadata.warnings_sent.$threshold = now()

jobs.purpose: Weekly sweep. Applies the calculation retention window: tax_calculations > 7 years → migrate to archive schema (matches invoice retention). NO hard-delete inside the module — regulator audit access is preserved via the archive.
steps: SELECT id, tenant_id FROM tax_calculations WHERE created_at < now() - interval '7 years' LIMIT 5000
For Enterprise tenants with tax_extended_retention entitlement: retention is 10 years instead of 7
For each row: INSERT into tax_calculations_archive + DELETE from tax_calculations (transactional)
Emit metric academorix.tax.calculations.archived_total

jobs.purpose: Weekly. Spot-checks 1% of the past week's calculations against the current-day provider re-computation. Divergence indicates rate drift or provider-side algorithm change.
steps: SELECT id, tenant_id, provider, source_amount_cents, source_currency, tax_amount_cents, calculated_at FROM tax_calculations WHERE calculated_at > now() - interval '7 days' AND random() < 0.01 LIMIT 500
For each: reload the customer + jurisdiction as they were at calculated_at, re-invoke the provider driver, capture the current-day tax_amount_cents
Compute delta = |original_tax - current_tax|
When delta > threshold (100 cents OR 1% of source): fire TaxCalculationDriftDetected (regulator-critical — may indicate the tenant is under-filing based on outdated provider algorithm)
Emit metric academorix.tax.calculations.drift_detected_total labelled by provider + severity
